units.source_text: Other financial instruments not carried at fair value are typically short term in nature and reprice to current market rates frequently. Accordingly,
units.translation_target_text: 其他不按公允价值计量的金融工具通常具有短期性质，并且经常根据当前市场利率重新定价。据此，

units.translation_target_text: 它们的账面金额是公允价值的合理近似值。其中包括中央银行、香港政府的现金及结余
units.translation_zh: 它们的账面金额是公允价值的合理近似值。其中包括中央银行、香港政府的现金及结余

units.source_text: certificates of indebtedness and Hong Kong currency notes in circulation, all of which are measured at amortised cost.
units.translation_target_text: 债权凭证及流通中的港币，均按摊余成本计量。

units.source_text: participants at the measurement date. This may be different from the theoretical economic value attributed from an instrument’s cash flows over
units.translation_target_text: 测量日期的参与者。这可能与工具现金流量的理论经济价值不同
units.translation_zh: 测量日期的参与者。这可能与工具现金流量的理论经济价值不同

units.source_text: its expected future life. Our valuation methodologies and assumptions in determining fair values for which no observable market prices are

units.translation_zh: 其预期的未来寿命。我们在确定没有可观察市场价格的公允价值时的估值方法和假设
